程序包的使用
com.qq.recruitment.model

使用com.qq.recruitment.model的程序包
程序包
说明
com.qq.recruitment.dao
 
com.qq.recruitment.service
 
com.qq.recruitment.util
 
  • com.qq.recruitment.dao使用的com.qq.recruitment.model中的类
    类
    说明
    Application
    Represents a candidate's application for a specific job, including AI match score and analysis results from the Volcengine Ark service.
    Favorite
    Tracks a user's favorite job postings for quick access.
    Job
    Represents a job posting with title, category, requirements, and application limits.
    User
    Represents a system user with authentication credentials and role-based access.
    UserProfile
    Stores an applicant's profile information including skills, bio, and workload tracking.
  • com.qq.recruitment.service使用的com.qq.recruitment.model中的类
    类
    说明
    Application
    Represents a candidate's application for a specific job, including AI match score and analysis results from the Volcengine Ark service.
    Job
    Represents a job posting with title, category, requirements, and application limits.
    User
    Represents a system user with authentication credentials and role-based access.
    UserProfile
    Stores an applicant's profile information including skills, bio, and workload tracking.
  • com.qq.recruitment.util使用的com.qq.recruitment.model中的类
    类
    说明
    User
    Represents a system user with authentication credentials and role-based access.
